---
title: "poisson equation"
author: "Deon Roos"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

A. 

$Y_i \sim Poisson(\lambda_i)$ 

$log(\lambda_i) = log(\beta_0 + \beta_1 \times X_i)$

<hr>

B. 

$Y_i \sim Poisson(\lambda_i)$

$log(\lambda_i) = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \times X_i$

<hr>

C. 

$log(Y_i) \sim Poisson(\lambda_i)$

$\lambda_i = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \times X_i$

<hr>

D. 

$log(Y_i) \sim Normal(\mu_i, \sigma^2)$

$\mu_i = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \times X_i$
